_meta.tolerance_note: Numbers may drift slightly across re-runs because (a) the OpenAI API is non-deterministic at temperature=0, (b) gpt-4o-mini's snapshot may have rolled, (c) embedder versions may shift cosine scores within tie-bands. ±2pp covers all three across our 7 prior runs.

runs.name: gpt4omini_topk
runs.description: gpt-4o-mini baseline — top-k=4 retrieval + optimizer chain. Reproduces §2 row 6 of the report.

runs.name: gpt4omini_decompose
runs.description: gpt-4o-mini + DecompositionRetriever — splits multi-hop questions into sub-questions, retrieves per part. Reproduces §2 row 4.
